Class AdminService

java.lang.Object
com.javaexam.service.AdminService
@Service public class AdminService extends Object

  • Constructor Details

    • AdminService

      public AdminService(UserProgressJdbcRepository userProgressJdbcRepository, QuestionJdbcRepository questionJdbcRepository, ChapterJdbcRepository chapterJdbcRepository, UserAnswerJdbcRepository userAnswerJdbcRepository, UserJdbcRepository userJdbcRepository)

  • Method Details

    • getAllUsersProgress

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<AllProgressDto> getAllUsersProgress()

    • getAllQuestionsWithAnswers

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<AdminQuestionDto> getAllQuestionsWithAnswers()
      Retrieves all questions with their correct answers for admin review. Note: Currently loads all records without pagination. For production systems with large datasets, consider implementing pagination or filtering by chapter.

    • deleteUserProgress

      @Transactional public void deleteUserProgress(String userId)
      Deletes all progress records for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - the ID of the user whose progress should be deleted
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no progress records exist for the given userId

    • deleteUserChapterProgress

      @Transactional public void deleteUserChapterProgress(String userId, String chapterId)
      Deletes progress/answers for a specific user and chapter only.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no progress record exists for the given userId/chapterId

    • deleteAllProgress

      @Transactional public int deleteAllProgress()
      Deletes all user progress records in the system.
      Returns:
      the number of records deleted

    • createQuestion

      @Transactional public void createQuestion(Question question)
      Creates a new question.
      Parameters:
      question - the question to create

    • updateQuestion

      @Transactional public void updateQuestion(Question question)
      Updates an existing question.
      Parameters:
      question - the question to update
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the question does not exist

    • deleteQuestion

      @Transactional public void deleteQuestion(String questionId)
      Deletes a question by ID.
      Parameters:
      questionId - the ID of the question to delete
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the question does not exist

    • getAllChapters

      public List<Chapter> getAllChapters()
      Retrieves all chapters.
      Returns:
      list of all chapters

    • createChapter

      @Transactional public void createChapter(Chapter chapter)
      Creates a new chapter.
      Parameters:
      chapter - the chapter to create

    • updateChapter

      @Transactional public void updateChapter(Chapter chapter)
      Updates an existing chapter.
      Parameters:
      chapter - the chapter to update
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the chapter does not exist

    • deleteChapter

      @Transactional public void deleteChapter(String chapterId)
      Deletes a chapter by ID.
      Parameters:
      chapterId - the ID of the chapter to delete
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the chapter does not exist

    • getChapterById

      public Chapter getChapterById(String chapterId)
      Retrieves a chapter by ID.
      Parameters:
      chapterId - the chapter ID
      Returns:
      the chapter

    • getUserAnswerDetails

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<UserAnswerDetailDto> getUserAnswerDetails(String userId, String chapterId)
      Retrieves detailed user answers for a specific user and chapter.

      If the user has not submitted any answers for the given chapter, this method returns an empty list rather than null.

      Parameters:
      userId - the user ID
      chapterId - the chapter ID
      Returns:
      a list of user answer details; the list will be empty if no answers are found for the specified user and chapter

    • getUsersByAnswerDate

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<UserAnswerByDateDto> getUsersByAnswerDate(String date)
      Retrieves distinct users who answered questions on a specific date. Returns one entry per user-chapter combination with score information.
      Parameters:
      date - the date in format YYYY-MM-DD
      Returns:
      a list of users with their answer and score information from that date

    • getMonthlyAttemptCount

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public int getMonthlyAttemptCount()
      今月の全ユーザーの試験挑戦回数を取得します。

      実行時の日付から今月の開始日時（1日 00:00）と終了日時（末日 23:59）を算出し、 その期間内に行われた進捗データの件数を集計します。

      * @return 今月の総挑戦回数

    • getUserCount

      public int getUserCount()

    • getPassFailStats

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Map<String,Integer> getPassFailStats()
      システム全体の合格・不合格の統計情報を取得します。

      以前は全データをメモリに読み込んで集計していましたが、 DB側で COUNT を行うメソッドに切り替え、パフォーマンスを向上させました。

      Returns:
      "pass"（合格数）と "fail"（不合格数）を格納したMap

    • getChapterStats

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Map<String,Integer> getChapterStats()
      チャプターごとの挑戦回数を集計し、挑戦者が多い順に並べて返します。

      DB側で集計済みのデータを取得し、Java側ではランキングのためのソートのみを行います。

      Returns:
      挑戦回数が多い順に並んだ、チャプター名と回数のマップ
